concepts.notes: Advanced family expansion around negotiation language. This branch models aushandeln as negotiating specific terms until a concrete result is fixed. It stays separate from generic verhandeln.

Advanced family expansion around output and formal results language. This branch models erbringen in the formal sense of providing or producing a result, proof, service, or contribution. It stays separate from verbringen = spend time somewhere.
Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-leistung. This branch models leistungsfähig in the sense of being able to perform strongly, effectively, or reliably under demand.
Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-leistung. This branch models Leistungsfähigkeit as the capacity to perform well, especially under requirements or strain.
Advanced family expansion around prerequisite and consequence language. This branch models bedingen in the formal sense of entailing or making another development necessary.
Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-vorgehen and concept-b1-zusammenhang. This branch models nachvollziehbar as understandable in terms of reasoning, explanation, or motivation.
Advanced communication expansion around misunderstanding. This branch models missverständlich in the sense of being phrased or presented in a way that can easily be misunderstood.
Advanced evaluation expansion around concept-b1-bewerten and concept-b2-einschaetzen. This branch models Einschätzung as an assessment or considered judgment.

Advanced reasoning expansion around Zusammenhang and assessment language. This branch models einordnen in the sense of placing information, events, or statements into a broader context or category so that they can be understood properly.
Advanced reasoning expansion around Zusammenhang and context-setting language. This branch models Einordnung as the act or result of contextualizing or classifying something meaningfully.
Coping and mastering family. This branch models bewaeltigen as successfully dealing with a difficult task, load, or situation.
Formal assurance family. This branch models gewaehrleisten as formally ensuring that a condition or standard holds.
Demanding-quality family. This branch models anspruchsvoll for tasks, texts, or people that require a high standard.
Proving-in-practice family. This branch models sich bewaehren as proving reliable or effective over time or under pressure.
Latitude family. This branch models Spielraum as the room for manoeuvre within limits, not physical clearance.
Foreseeability family. This branch models absehbar as predictable within a reasonable horizon.
Relative-importance family. This branch models Stellenwert as the rank or importance something holds within a larger whole.
Clarity family, next to concept-b1-klaeren and concept-b2-klarstellen. This branch models verdeutlichen as making an idea easier to grasp, often with examples.
Argument-structure family. This branch models Kernaussage as the central claim of a text or talk.
Depth-of-treatment family. This branch models eingehend as thorough and detailed examination or discussion.
Informativeness family. This branch models aufschlussreich as revealing something one did not know before.

lexemes.notes: adds connotation of difficulty/effort not present in aushandeln - 'to negotiate' or 'to work out' are closer; 'to hammer out' is idiomatic and informal
captures the contextualization sense of einordnen but misses the classification/ranking sense ('to categorize', 'to assess', 'to place')
bare form of lexeme-en-c1-put-in-context; same meaning_status applies

examples.sentence: Nach mehreren Gesprächen steht der endgültige Preis endlich fest.
Dopo diversi incontri, il prezzo finale è ormai fissato.
After several rounds of talks, the final price is now settled.
Der Bericht soll klar zeigen, welche Ergebnisse am Ende vorliegen.
Il rapporto deve mostrare con chiarezza quali risultati sono disponibili alla fine.
The report is meant to show clearly which results are available in the end.
Das System bleibt auch bei hoher Belastung schnell und stabil.
Il sistema resta rapido e stabile anche sotto un carico elevato.
The system stays fast and stable even under heavy load.
Die Untersuchung zeigt, wie gut der Motor unter Belastung arbeitet.
L'analisi mostra quanto bene il motore lavori sotto carico.
The analysis shows how well the engine works under load.
Der starke Anstieg führt zu zusätzlichen Massnahmen.
Il forte aumento rende necessarie misure supplementari.
The sharp increase makes additional measures necessary.
Dopo la spiegazione, la sua decisione appare chiara a tutti.
After the explanation, his decision seems clear to everyone.
Ohne den zweiten Satz klingt die Nachricht leicht in die falsche Richtung.
Senza la seconda frase, il messaggio può suonare facilmente nel modo sbagliato.
Without the second sentence, the message can easily sound wrong.
Er versucht, die neuen Zahlen im größeren Bild zu verstehen.
Prova a leggere i nuovi numeri dentro un quadro più ampio.
He tries to read the new figures within a broader picture.
Sein kurzer Kommentar hilft allen, die Meldung besser zu verstehen.
Il suo breve commento aiuta tutti a capire meglio la notizia.
His short comment helps everyone understand the report better.
La sua prima idea della situazione si rivela poi abbastanza precisa.
Her first reading of the situation later proves fairly accurate.
No clear conclusion can be drawn from the available data.
Dai dati disponibili non è possibile trarre una conclusione netta.
Sie hat mehrere Bedenken gegen den vorgeschlagenen Zeitplan geäußert.
She raised several concerns about the proposed timeline.
Ha sollevato diverse preoccupazioni riguardo al programma proposto.
Without sufficient documentation, the claim cannot be accepted.
Senza prove sufficienti, l'affermazione non può essere accettata.
The researchers formulated a clear finding at the end of their study.
I ricercatori hanno formulato un risultato chiaro al termine del loro studio.
Die neuen Erkenntnisse haben die bisherige Theorie als falsch erwiesen.
The new findings have shown the previous theory to be wrong.
Le nuove scoperte hanno dimostrato che la teoria precedente era errata.
Aus den Beobachtungen lässt sich eine allgemeine Regel entwickeln.
A general rule can be developed from these observations.
Da queste osservazioni è possibile elaborare una regola generale.
Wenn die Ausgangsannahme falsch ist, ist auch das Ergebnis nicht korrekt.
If the initial assumption is wrong, the conclusion will also be incorrect.
Se l'assunzione di partenza è sbagliata, anche la conclusione sarà incorretta.
The researchers' assumption still needs to be verified through further experiments.
L'assunzione dei ricercatori deve ancora essere verificata attraverso ulteriori esperimenti.
Das Ergebnis lässt sich mathematisch aus den vorhandenen Daten berechnen.
The result can be calculated mathematically from the available data.
Il risultato può essere calcolato matematicamente dai dati disponibili.
Die Kommission hat das Projekt anhand klarer Kriterien bewertet.
The committee evaluated the project on the basis of clear criteria.
La commissione ha valutato il progetto sulla base di criteri chiari.
The explanation sounds convincing but cannot yet be proved.
La spiegazione sembra convincente, ma non può ancora essere dimostrata.
A factually grounded analysis is crucial for good decisions.
Un'analisi fondata su dati concreti è essenziale per buone decisioni.
The argument was so convincing that no one could object to it.
L'argomento era così convincente che nessuno ha potuto obiettare.
Die Bewerbungen werden nach mehreren klar definierten Maßstäben bewertet.
The applications are evaluated according to several clearly defined standards.
Le candidature vengono valutate in base a diversi parametri chiaramente definiti.
Die Leistungen der Schüler werden mit einem einheitlichen Referenzpunkt verglichen.
The students' performance is compared against a uniform reference point.
Le prestazioni degli studenti vengono confrontate con un punto di riferimento uniforme.
Die abschließende Bewertung des Projekts wird nächste Woche bekanntgegeben.
The final evaluation of the project will be announced next week.
Il giudizio finale sul progetto verrà reso noto la settimana prossima.
Die Frage nach der Finanzierung steht im Mittelpunkt der gesamten Diskussion.
The question of funding is at the heart of the entire discussion.
La questione del finanziamento è al centro di tutta la discussione.
Sein Einfluss auf die Entscheidung war von ausschlaggebender Bedeutung.
His influence on the decision was of determining importance.
La sua influenza sulla decisione ha avuto un peso decisivo.
Sie setzt ihre Pläne ohne Abweichungen und zielgerichtet um.
She implements her strategy without deviations and in a coherent manner.
Applica il suo piano in modo sistematico e senza deviazioni.
The researchers searched all relevant sources in a methodical way.
I ricercatori hanno esaminato tutte le fonti pertinenti in modo metodico.
A clearly organized presentation helps the audience follow the content.
Una presentazione chiaramente organizzata aiuta il pubblico a seguire i contenuti.
It is important to clearly distinguish between similar concepts.
È importante distinguere chiaramente tra concetti simili.
Die Forscherin hat die neuen Daten mit früheren Erkenntnissen in Verbindung gebracht.
The researcher connected the new data with earlier findings.
La ricercatrice ha collegato i nuovi dati alle scoperte precedenti.
Ihr Schweigen ließ darauf schließen, dass sie nicht einverstanden war.
Her silence suggested that she did not agree.
Il suo silenzio lasciava intendere che non era d'accordo.
Trotz der knappen Frist bringt sie das gesamte Pensum ohne Hilfe zu Ende.
Das neue Verfahren sorgt dafür, dass alle Daten jederzeit geschützt bleiben.
La nuova procedura garantisce che tutti i dati restino protetti in ogni momento.
Der Kurs verlangt von allen Teilnehmenden sehr viel Vorwissen und Konzentration.
Das einfache Verfahren zeigt auch nach Jahren im Alltag seinen Wert.
Der Vertrag lässt uns bei den Terminen noch etwas Freiheit.
Die Folgen der Entscheidung lassen sich bereits heute gut erkennen.
Le conseguenze della decisione sono già prevedibili oggi.
Gesundheit hat in ihrem Leben inzwischen einen sehr hohen Rang.
Mit einer einfachen Grafik macht sie den Zusammenhang sofort verständlich.
Ha esplicitato il collegamento con un semplice grafico.
Am Ende fasst er den zentralen Gedanken des Vortrags in einem Satz zusammen.
Die Kommission prüft den Vorschlag Punkt für Punkt und sehr genau.
Das Gespräch mit der Zeitzeugin brachte viele unerwartete Einblicke.
L'intervista alla testimone è stata molto rivelatrice.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Durch Verhandlungen schrittweise zu einem konkret festgelegten Ergebnis oder Detail kommen.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier ist das Ergebnis stärker im Fokus als beim allgemeineren verhandeln.

antonym_policy_json.reason: no_single_robust_opposite_for_hammer_out_verb

concept_definitions.short_definition: To deal successfully with a difficult task, amount, or situation.

Dafür sorgen, dass etwas sicher vorhanden ist oder zuverlässig funktioniert.

concept_definitions.short_definition: To show over time or under pressure that one is reliable and suitable.

Der Bereich, in dem man frei entscheiden oder handeln kann, ohne Grenzen zu verletzen.
